SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

THIS SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT ("Agreement") is made and entered into on this 15th day of October 2023, by and between:

(1) Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No.: S7654321B), of 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 6123 4567, email: tanweiming@example.sg; and

(2) Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No.: S8765432C), of 456 Bukit Timah Road, #02-11, Singapore 345678, contact number: +65 6234 5678, email: sitiaishah@sample.sg.

WHEREAS, Dr. Tan Wei Ming agrees to purchase, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah agrees to sell, 10,000 shares of XYZ Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T21LL1111K) for the total amount of SGD 500,000.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
